# Scam Checker — scamchecker.app

User-agent: *
Allow: /

## Purpose

Scam Checker is a free, privacy-first tool that helps people determine
whether a website, email, SMS, WhatsApp message, image, or PDF is a scam.
It also publishes scam-identification guides, an emergency
"have I been scammed?" damage-control flow, and a community scam-reporting
database.

## Primary pages

- https://scamchecker.app/check — paste a message, email, or link to get an
  instant risk assessment.
- https://scamchecker.app/have-i-been-scammed — emergency damage-control
  checklist if you think you have already been scammed.
- https://scamchecker.app/guides — scam-identification guides and learning
  hub.
- https://scamchecker.app/reports — community-reported scams.
- https://scamchecker.app/global-scam-reporting — official scam-reporting
  contacts for the US, UK, Canada, Australia, and India.
- https://scamchecker.app/blog — latest scam alerts and safety news.

## Owner

- Site: https://shubhamsingla.tech
- GitHub: https://github.com/BeastBoyShubhz
- Author: Shubham Singla (cybersecurity background, security-first design)

## Focus areas

- Cybersecurity
- Scam detection
- Phishing prevention
- Fraud awareness

## Privacy

- We do not store anything users paste into the scam checker.
- Analysis runs client-side; pasted content is never sent to our servers.
- Submitted reports store only what the reporter chooses to provide; we do
  not collect personal identifiers from the reporter.
- We do not send pasted content, URLs, phone numbers, email addresses, file
  names, or OCR text to analytics.

## Sitemap

https://scamchecker.app/sitemap.xml
